prompt: Specify a notch RC network to suppress a narrow interference band on a measurement line. Frequencies below 1.75 kHz and above 5.35 kHz must be passed with <= 1.1 dB loss. * Twin-T notch section(s)
* Twin-T stage 1 — resistive arm

CTA1S1 NTA1A    0        15.5n
CTA1S2 NTA1A    0        15.5n

CTA11  VIN      NTA1B    15.5n
CTA12  NTA1B    NTA1OUT  15.5n
RTA1S1 NTA1B    0        4.02k
RTA1S2 NTA1B    0        4.02k
EOUT VOUT  0     NTA1OUT 0  1
